mapper.select: select no, userID, subject, context, hit, writedate, thumbnail, season, lat, lng, addrtitle from board where userID=#{userID} order by no desc
select s.no, s.subject, s.season, c.context, DATE_FORMAT(c.writedate, '%y-%m-%d %H:%i') as commentDate from comment c join board s on c.no=s.no where c.userID=#{userID} order by c.no desc
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board WHERE userID = #{userID}

SELECT s.no, s.subject, s.season, c.context AS comment, DATE_FORMAT(c.writedate, '%y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS commentDate FROM comment c JOIN board s ON c.no = s.no WHERE c.userID = #{userID} ORDER BY c.no DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
